params.amount: The amount of shares to transfer
params.from: The address to transfer shares from

params.amount: The amount of shares to return
params.to: The address to return shares to

escrowShares(address,uint256).notice: Transfer shares from user to escrow during redeem request

initialize(address,address).notice: Initialize the escrow with required parameters

returnShares(address,uint256).notice: Return shares from escrow to user during redeem cancellation
